content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials exist (reviewer@focusshield.example / Gv7kQz2mNp) but notes.txt just says "n/a" instead of explaining app flow, per `fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt:1`.

Pierre: Apple's reviewers need to know not just credentials but *how* to reach gated features — here the app has both a login wall (`App/LoginView.swift`) and a subscription paywall (`App/PaywallView.swift`), so reviewers may get stuck without instructions on navigating past the paywall or whether a sandbox subscription is pre-provisioned. Please replace "n/a" with concrete steps: how to log in, whether the subscription is already active for the demo account, and how to reach app-blocking/schedules/reports features for testing. This is a common cause of App Review delays for login+paywall combos.
